---
title: "\'The Blackbird\'s Nest\'"
---

## \'The Blackbird\'s Nest\'

**Author:** Juliana Horatia Ewing
**Date:** 1861
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (August 1861), 188-198.

### Notes

Signed J. H. G..  Reprinted in Ewing\'s [[otherbook:330]<i>Melchior\'s Dream and Other Tales</i>] (1862)

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
